title: Voota down Black Cats
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Voota Football Club of Knysna,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Voota Football Club of Knysna, formerly known as CX Celtics, downed Black Cats 1-0 in a tough Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional League game on Saturday 8 February at George's Lawaaikamp Stadium.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Voota Football Club of Knysna, formerly known as CX Celtics, downed Black Cats 1-0 in a tough Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional League game on Saturday 8 February at George's Lawaaikamp Stadium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of the stars","html":"One of the stars"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lukhanyo Phaphu of Voota FC, one of the stars of the game, scored the winning goal.","html":"Lukhanyo Phaphu of Voota FC, one of the stars of the game, scored the winning goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 27 points, Voota, in fourth position in the Safa Eden Regional League log table, are pushing hard to be in the top position.","html":"With 27 points, Voota, in fourth position in the Safa Eden Regional League log table, are pushing hard to be in the top position."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
